scope: no-training qualification of the factorized partition encoder and exact stoichiometry-first composition law

model.partition_representation: shared count-position encoder plus current-slot query; no per-partition embedding table

decision_rule.pass: authorize one seed-5705 exact-one-pass IID-calibration composition-only screen with the factorized partition encoder
decision_rule.fail: repair only the factorized partition/species probability law or vectorized implementation
decision_rule.boundary: Q2 cannot authorize site assignment, L1/M1, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
